cardPlayed.name: Stacked Deck
cardPlayed.text: ACTION (play on your turn or in showdowns.)  Look at the top 3 cards of your Main Deck. Put 1 into your hand and recycle the rest.

cardPlayed.name: Stacked Deck
cardPlayed.text:
[Action] (Play on your turn or in showdowns.)
Look at the top 3 cards of your Main Deck. Put 1 into your hand and recycle the rest.

cardPlayed.name: Reinforce
cardPlayed.text: Look at the top 5 cards of your Main Deck. You may play a unit from among them. Its Energy cost is reduced by :rb_energy_5:. Then recycle the remaining cards.

cardPlayed.name: Party Favors
cardPlayed.text: Each other player chooses Cards or Runes. For each player that chooses Cards, you and that player each draw 1. For each player that chooses Runes, you and that player each channel 1 rune exhausted.

cardPlayed.name: Catalyst of Aeons
cardPlayed.text: Channel 2 runes exhausted. If you couldn't channel 2 runes this way, draw 1.

cardPlayed.name: Guards!
cardPlayed.text:
[Hidden]_ (Hide now for :rb_rune_rainbow: to react with later for :rb_energy_0:.)_
Play a 2 :rb_might: Sand Soldier unit token. You may pay :rb_rune_order: to ready it.

cardPlayed.name: Falling Star
cardPlayed.text:
Do this twice:
Deal 3 to a unit. (You can choose different units.).

cardPlayed.name: Shakedown
cardPlayed.text:
[Reaction] (Play any time, even before spells and abilities resolve.)
Choose an enemy unit. Deal 6 to it unless its controller has you draw 2.

cardPlayed.name: Wallop
cardPlayed.text:
[Action] (Play on your turn or in showdowns.)
As you play this, you may spend a buff as an additional cost. If you do, ignore this spell's cost.
Ready a unit.

cardPlayed.name: Acceptable Losses
cardPlayed.text:
[Action] (Play on your turn or in showdowns.)
Each player kills one of their gear.

cardPlayed.name: Temptation
cardPlayed.text:
[Repeat] :rb_energy_2: (You may pay the additional cost to repeat this spell's effect.)
Move an enemy unit to a location where there's a unit with the same controller.

cardPlayed.name: Cull the Weak
cardPlayed.text: Each player kills one of their units.

cardPlayed.name: Show of Strength
cardPlayed.text:
[Reaction] (Play any time, even before spells and abilities resolve.)
Draw 1 for each of your [Mighty] units. (A unit is Mighty while it has 5+ :rb_might:.).

cardPlayed.name: Promising Future
cardPlayed.text: Each player looks at the top 5 cards of their Main Deck, chooses one, then recycles the rest. Starting with the next player, each player plays those cards, ignoring Energy costs. (They must still pay Power costs.).

cardPlayed.name: Piercing Light
cardPlayed.text:
[Repeat] :rb_energy_2::rb_rune_fury: (You may pay the additional cost to repeat this spell's effect.)
Deal 2 to a unit at a battlefield, then deal 2 to up to one other unit.

cardPlayed.name: Rocket Barrage
cardPlayed.text:
[Repeat] :rb_energy_4::rb_rune_mind: (You may pay the additional cost to repeat this spell's effect, and may make different choices.)
Choose one —

  • Deal 4 to a unit in a base.

  • Kill a gear.

.

cardPlayed.name: Flurry of Blades
cardPlayed.text:
[Reaction] (Play any time, even before spells and abilities resolve.)
Deal 1 to all units at battlefields.

cardPlayed.name: Consult the Past
cardPlayed.text:
[Hidden] (Hide now for :rb_rune_rainbow: to react with later for :rb_energy_0:.)
[Reaction] (Play any time, even before spells and abilities resolve.)
Draw 2.

cardPlayed.name: Cannon Barrage
cardPlayed.text:
[Reaction] (Play any time, even before spells and abilities resolve.)
Deal 2 to all enemy units in combat.

cardPlayed.name: Flurry of Blades
cardPlayed.text:
[Reaction] (Play any time, even before spells and abilities resolve.)
Deal 1 to all units at battlefields.

cardPlayed.name: Invert Timelines
cardPlayed.text: Each player discards their hand, then draws 4.

cardPlayed.name: Production Surge
cardPlayed.text:
This costs :rb_energy_2: less if you control a Mech.
Play a 3 :rb_might: Mech unit token to your base.
Draw 1.

cardPlayed.name: Ride the Wind
cardPlayed.text:
[Action] (Play on your turn or in showdowns.)
Move a friendly unit and ready it.

cardPlayed.name: Siphon Power
cardPlayed.text:
[Reaction] (Play any time, even before spells and abilities resolve.)
Choose a battlefield. Give friendly units there +1 :rb_might: this turn and enemy units there -1 :rb_might: this turn, to a minimum of 1 :rb_might:.

cardPlayed.name: Feral Strength
cardPlayed.text:
[Reaction] (Play any time, even before spells and abilities resolve.)
[Repeat] :rb_energy_2: (You may pay the additional cost to repeat this spell's effect.)
Give a unit +2 :rb_might: this turn.

cardPlayed.name: Deathgrip
cardPlayed.text:
[Reaction] (Play any time, even before spells and abilities resolve.)
Kill a friendly unit to give +:rb_might: equal to its Might to another friendly unit this turn. Draw 1.

cardPlayed.name: Firestorm
cardPlayed.text: Deal 3 to all enemy units at a battlefield.

cardPlayed.name: Party Favors
cardPlayed.text: Each other player chooses Cards or Runes. For each player that chooses Cards, you and that player each draw 1. For each player that chooses Runes, you and that player each channel 1 rune exhausted.

cardPlayed.name: Noxian Guillotine
cardPlayed.text:
[Action]_ (Play on your turn or in showdowns.)_
Choose a unit. Kill it the next time it takes damage this turn.
[Legion] — Kill it now instead. (Get the effect if you've played another card this turn.).
